business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 prior insurance policy data. No current/requested limits specified.

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
concerns: Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) are permitted
No written contracts with all subcontractors
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are not maintained
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Clean loss history with 0 claims reported across prior insurance terms from 2022 to 2024 with Liberty Mutual, Hartford, and Chubb.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Yes to formal safety program. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. No Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained. No lockout/tagout procedures in place.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Zero claims reported in prior history (2022, 2023, 2024).
